title: LiteVision
description: Instant, flicker-free night vision for Paper and Fabric — lightweight, configurable, and built for modern servers and clients.
body:
# 🌙 LiteVision – Instant, Flicker-Free Night Vision(NEW)
A lightweight night vision solution for **Paper (and forks)** and **Fabric**.

~~Potion spam. Command abuse. Unnecessary overhead.~~     
Just clean, reliable night vision with full control for servers and players.

---

## 🎯 Why LiteVision?

-  **Instant toggle** – No delay or flicker  
-  **Clean visuals** – No clunky potion reapplication  
-  **Persistent state** – Remembers your setting after relog/restart  
-  **Per-world control** – Enable or restrict by dimension  
-  **Works client-side or server-side**

Designed to be simple, stable, and efficient.

---
![Normal Minecraft vs LiteVision Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d75a021f22e3bc906ee7065246d8c5050f2accd2.png)
## ✨ Features

### 🔥 Smart Hotkey (Paper Exclusive)
Hold a torch in either hand and press `F` to toggle night vision instantly.

### 💡 Native Implementation
Uses Minecraft’s built-in systems for stable and glitch-free rendering.

### 🌫 Optional Transitions
Configurable fade-in / fade-out effects for smoother visual switching.

### 🎨 Optional Visual & Audio Feedback
- Action bar notifications  
- Optional particles (Glow / Smoke)  
- Custom toggle sounds  

All effects are fully configurable or can be disabled.

---
![Demo GIF](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/blatzar49-source/random-gif/2c3735ab0afd0b5e8d8fe842b558748d085071c7/Untitled%20Video%20Design%20(1).gif)

---
## ⚙️ Server Controls

- 🌍 **World / Dimension whitelist & blacklist**
- ☀️ **Auto-disable in bright areas**
- 🛡 **Anti-spam cooldown protection**
- 🛠 Fully configurable behavior via config file

Built to avoid unnecessary load and keep TPS stable.

---
![My GIF](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/blatzar49-source/random-gif/5c1bb39313941a34ee86f5e2237c08ccf9e827f1/Untitled%20Video%20Design.gif)

---
## 📋 Commands & Permissions

| Command | Description | Permission |
|----------|------------|------------|
| `/nv` | Toggle night vision | `nightvision.use` |
| `/nv reload` | Reload configuration | `nightvision.reload` |
| `/nv help` | Show help menu | `nightvision.use` |

---

## 🧠 Technical Notes

- Modular manager system (Config, NightVision, PlayerData)
- Event-driven design
- Lightweight footprint
- Designed for long-term stability on modern Paper & Fabric versions

---

## 🚀 Installation

1. Download the correct version for your platform (**Fabric** or **Paper**) and Minecraft version. Use fabric loader `0.18.4` only if using fabric.
2. Place the file in your `mods` (Fabric) or `plugins` (Paper) folder.
3. Restart your server or game.
4. Edit the generated config file if customization is needed (server-side).
